Daily Quests

Daily quests use a cleaner data structure than story missions, so the targets and rewards can be resolved much more directly.

QuestLevelTypePlaceTargetRewards
A good start1killHyperionHyperionXP, Steel
Arrenius frenzy10killArreniusArreniusXP, ARTIFACT
Become more powerful2upgrade_techAnyGeneral objectiveXP, Hydrogen Crystal
Brain matters40killNeuronaMother BrainXP, ARTIFACT
Cynapsian gauntlet80land_on_planetExretorumExretorumXP, ARTIFACT
Elite explorer - Sarkinon70land_on_planetArgenonArgenonSteel, Iridium
Everyone's favourite: bug legs25pickupAnyBug LegPlasma Fluids, Iridium
Explorer - Kritillian12land_on_planetArboreaArboreaXP, Steel
Explosive moth chaos22killMitrilionBlack Moth lvl 17, Dread Moth lvl 24XP, ARTIFACT
Fulzar madness90killFulzarFulzarXP, ARTIFACT
Kill Mandrom16killArreniusMandromXP, Plasma Fluids
Kill Tefat6killHyperionTefatXP, ARTIFACT
Planet wars18capture_planetAnyGeneral objectiveXP, Iridium
Pod Challenger25missionsAnyGeneral objectiveXP, POD
Pod Master90missionsAnyGeneral objectiveXP, POD
Pod Novice10missionsAnyGeneral objectiveXP, POD
PvP champion14win_pvpAnyGeneral objectiveXP, ARTIFACT
Survival of the fittest60play_survivalAnyGeneral objectiveSteel, Plasma Fluids
Team-work FTW30heal_playerAnyGeneral objectiveXP
The gauntlet8land_on_planetVetinariVetinariSteel, Hydrogen Crystal
Variation is fun50kill_distinctAnyGeneral objectiveSteel, Hydrogen Crystal
